This is just an example. So the way that this would work is you want to make sure that you have a down payment screen slide for the payment so that you get the initial down payment covered and you have authorization for that. And if you have two payments that are split, then you can put that there. Then you're going to have your weekly payment. So if someone puts some money down and then they're paying weekly payments, then this is when the weekly payments would be about. But these are going to be the discounted weekly payments, right? Because they put a certain percentage down. And so you want to have a second start date and potentially end date and you put zero here. I can put no end, which would be the full price date that you would have. All right. And so this is like, as an example, let's say someone goes and says they're going to put $600 down and they're doing 34 weeks of group plus hybrid. So they put 600 down and so 600 would go right, and then you'd have $81 a week, which would go. And then you would have your 99 a week, which is what you know the actual price is, which would go. And then that would also become the start dates. The end date is the start date of this one. And then that is when the full price weekly payments kick in. Okay. Again, this is an example not to be used for yourself. But just an example. So here saying, Hey, you're agreeing to make sure all the payments are on time. So this is the first thing of any guarantee. They got to make sure that they make their payments on time. If they don't make their payments on time, they haven't met their commitment to you. So you need to meet your commitment to them. Right. And so that's the first you should always have, which is just saying that they're going to pay on time for their credit clients, that they have to give about a new car within 48 hours or the service guarantees void that they're going to respond to messages from you within 24 hours. That's fair. They're going to complete their workouts outlined by the trainer in gym or at home workouts credited when they check in.
